hypothesis: If an LLM agent is augmented with chemistry-specific tools and embedded in an iterative loop with diffusion-based structure estimation and ML property evaluation, then it will outperform tool-free LLMs and diffusion-only baselines in generating compositionally valid, unique, and novel inorganic materials that meet specified formation-energy targets (within ±0.25 eV/atom), because tool-guided reasoning and feedback enable more informed proposal and refinement of candidate compositions.
